platform.name: Canva Developer Platform
platform.category: Frameworks, mobile, games, hardware, and creative ecosystems

assumptions: Node.js v24, npm v11, and git can be installed.

developer_goal: Create a Canva account, scaffold a hello_world app with the Canva CLI, and preview Hello world in the Canva editor.

first_success.outcome: The hello_world app preview opens in Canva and the example button responds with Hello world.
first_success.observable_signal: In the preview editor, clicking the example control shows the Hello world response documented for the template.

route_selection.surface: Canva Apps SDK Quickstart CLI hello_world preview
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Canva Apps SDK Quickstart CLI hello_world preview

candidates.name: Canva Apps SDK Quickstart CLI hello_world preview
candidates.reason: Canva Apps SDK documentation names Quickstart to get an app running in minutes. The first fully specified route uses the Canva CLI with hello_world, public distribution, and Preview in the Canva editor. Connect APIs quickstart is a separate OAuth starter-kit clone path.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a Canva account.
Install @canva/cli globally and run canva login; allow access and paste the confirmation code.
Run canva apps create with hello_world, public distribution, git, and installDependencies.
required_path.observable_result: Developer Portal opens the new app configuration.

required_path.action: cd into the app folder and run npm start so the local server listens on localhost:8080.
In Developer Portal Code upload, set Development URL to the local server and click Preview / Open.
Click the example control and confirm Hello world.

prerequisites.description: git, Node.js v24, npm v11, and Canva CLI.

uncertainties.question: Are all signup and first-success fields for Canva Developer Platform fully enumerated in public docs?
uncertainties.impact: Atomic field counts inside account or billing steps may be incomplete.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Live console fields can differ from documentation screenshots.
